title: Labs
content:
The labs in this course use LabVIEW System Design Software.
LAB # LAB TOPICS AND FILES ADDITIONAL FILES 0 Installing LabVIEW (PDF) 1 On / Off and Linear Control (PDF) Lab 1 Files (ZIP - 3.4MB) (This zip folder contains: 1 .aliases file, 1 .lvlps file, 1 .lvproj file, and 1 .vi file) 2 Thermal Control Loop (PDF)
Thermal Example (PDF)
Lab 2 Files (ZIP) (This zip folder contains: 1 .lvproj file, 1 .vi file, and 1 .lvlib file ) 3 PI and PID Controllers (PDF)
Instructions for Dynamic Signal Analyzer (PDF)
Lab 3 Files (ZIP - 1.3MB) (This zip folder contains: 1 .lvlib file, 1 .lvproj file, 1 .m file, 1 .txt file, and 1 .vi file) 4 Op-Amp Circuit (PDF)
Pencast with Circuit Analysis (PDF - 1.7MB)
A741 Spec Sheet (PDF)
No additional files for this lab. 5 Current-Control Loop (PDF) No additional files for this lab. 6 Servomotor Velocity Control (PDF) Lab 6 Files (ZIP) (This zip folder contains: 1 .aliases file, 1 .lvlps file, 1 .lvproj file, and 1 .vi file) 7 Servomotor Position Control (PDF) Lab 7 Files (ZIP) (This zip folder contains: 1 .aliases file, 1 .lvlps file, 1 .lvproj file, 1. llb, and 2 .vi files)
